channel.title: Blog
channel.description: A Professional WordPress Developer & Customer Support Specialist.

item.title: Automate WordPress Cron Monitoring with Telefy: A Server-Side Guide
item.description: A guide on using telefy package for failed cron events.

item.title: How to Set Up Automated Backups in WordPress (Free & Paid Options)
item.description: Learn how to set up automated backups for your WordPress site using free and paid plugins, cloud storage, and best practices to keep your data safe.

item.title: How to Use WP-CLI to Manage WordPress from the Command Line
item.description: Speed up WordPress management with WP-CLI. Learn how to install, use, and automate tasks like updates, backups, and more from the command line.

item.title: Configure Fluent SMTP with Zoho Mail
item.description: A guide to configuring your Zoho email with FluentSMTP for WordPress email delivery.

item.title: Configure Fluent SMTP with Yahoo
item.description: A guide to configuring your Yahoo email with FluentSMTP for WordPress email delivery.

item.title: Exploring Advanced Custom Fields (ACF) in WordPress
item.description: How to guide on Exploring Advanced Custom Fields (ACF) in WordPress.

item.title: Configure Fluent SMTP with cPanel Webmail
item.description: A guide to configuring your cPanel Webmail (Roundcube) with FluentSMTP for WordPress email delivery.

item.title: Configure Fluent SMTP with Outlook
item.description: A guide to configuring your Outlook email with FluentSMTP for WordPress email delivery.

item.title: Configure Fluent SMTP with AWS SES
item.description: A guide to configuring your AWS SES email with FluentSMTP for WordPress email delivery.

item.title: Configure Fluent SMTP with AOL
item.description: A guide to configuring your AOL email with FluentSMTP for WordPress email delivery.

item.title: Configure Gmail with Fluent SMTP
item.description: A guide to configuring your Gmail email with FluentSMTP for WordPress email delivery.

item.title: How to Use WP_Schedule_Event for Scheduling Automated Tasks
item.description: A guide on using WP_Schedule_Event in WordPress.

item.title: Improving WordPress Performance with Object Caching (Redis/Memcached)
item.description: Boost your WordPress site’s speed with object caching using Redis or Memcached. Learn how they work and follow this step-by-step guide to implement them.

item.title: Dark and Light theme toggle using CSS
item.description: How to guide on Dark and Light theme toggle using CSS.

item.title: Creating Scalable WordPress Websites
item.description: How to guide on Creating Scalable WordPress Websites.

item.title: How to Add Google Analytics to WordPress Without a Plugin
item.description: Learn how to manually integrate Google Analytics with your WordPress site for accurate, lightweight tracking.
